data.title: Cleanup examples Plugin
data.description:
# Cleanup examples Plugin

## Problem Statement

The examples plugin (likely contains example/demo code) needs review as part of the marketplace-wide plugin audit.

## Findings

* Plugin located at `plugins/examples/`
* Likely contains example/reference code
* Lower priority than production plugins

## Recommended Action

Review if examples are still relevant, update documentation, remove outdated examples.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Examples reviewed for relevance
- [ ] Outdated examples removed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Examples still work

## Work Log

### 2026-01-04 - Todo Created

**By:** Claude Code

**Actions:**

* Created cleanup todo as part of plugin audit initiative
